meaning: n.(坐时的)大腿前部,膝盖,舔声,(水)溅泼声,重叠的部分,(跑道的)一圈,衣兜,下摆vi.重叠,围住,轻拍,舔vt.包围,抱...在膝上,使重叠,舔食,泼溅,拍打
examples: Her eyes dropped to her lap.
He was overtaken on the final lap.
She sat with her hands in her lap.
Sebastian Saavedra hit a tire barrier on lap 33 after Andretti ran him into a wall.
After his victory, Rutherford took a victory lap around the stadium that outlasted the 10, 000 meters.
